samples:
I wonder if I'll ever learn to swim
Or whether this is just the place for me to rest
Am I weightless? Or does my spirit lift
And leave me wondering what I want from life


A song for the broken-hearted
Not too late, find your way home


You can hear the pouring rain outside
It's coming down all through the pipes and drains
The river overflows into the street
While water flows everywhere that we compete


A song for the broken hearted
Not too late, find your way home


As passion encircles daily
Within sight of danger lies
Listen to your heart within you
Trust in the plan it provides
Passion encircles daily
Within sight of danger lies
Listen to your heart within you
Trust in the plan it provides


Life shattered into pieces
Not too far behind
Afraid of psychic warning
The warning hasn't arrived
Life shattered into pieces
Not too far behind
Afraid of psychic warning
The warning hasn't arrived

Ghost story of the fallen
An angel flies above
Siren sounds loud, warning given
To land on other's love
Always remain a stranger
A friend to none
Stay as long as underground
Death of a mother comes
Guard her grave with honour
Leave her bone engraved
Taking hearts, minds and lips
Gone before time

Capillarian slaved to the tides
Gone forever is the life we live


Our thoughts reside in consciousness of self
Surrounding spirits guide us from our path
In fine detail, the days and months have all been planned
We cleanse ourselves in sacred waters


Hold the weight of this world
And save yourself
Save yourself from the darkness


Carve your teeth with needles
The ones you'll find within the sheep's head
Chew the flesh and drink its blood
Life after life, we will lead the way


Holding hearts together
Giving strength to our bodies
Binding spirits
Make sure that they stay
Forevermore


Guard our lives with silver wings
Flying through the cracks
Trapped inside the pit
Head for higher ground
Always up above
Within the clouds
Reflections fade away
Leave them down below
To those who fear no evil
Lay yourselves bare
Burn your skin into fine ash
Teach me how to breathe again


Holding hearts together
Giving strength to our bodies
Binding spirits
Make sure that they stay
Forevermore

Straight from the pit
I heard 'em say
That he was broke
And owed the bank a pay


He didn't have
A fucking clue
How could I tell him
His pockets were empty?

Yeah, yeah

Taking his money
Right out of his pocket
Leave him hanging
Then cut him loose and let 'im drop
Oh yeah

Taking his money
Right out of his pocket
Leave him hanging
Then cut him loose and let 'im drop
Oh yeah


Straight from the pit
I heard 'em say
That he was broke
And owed the bank a pay


He didn't have
A fucking clue
How could I tell him
His pockets were empty?

Taking his money
Right out of his pocket
Leave him hanging
Then cut the circle around us
Oh yeah
Taking his money
Right out of his pocket
Leave him hanging
Then cut the circle around us

No teeth or tongue
Or lips at all
Not too much to bite on now
It makes me sad

Straight from the pit of hell
Cometh vengeance and retribution
Bring me forth a fallen man
I will cleanse my shame with spirit
Souls up wings out in this black hole
Surrounding the center space
Center space


Life is short, live fast
Go ahead and ask
Can I ride your coat tail?
Can I use your name?
Life is short, live fast
Go ahead and ask
Can I ride your coat tail?
Can I use your name?


Ride upon my back
Headphones burning ear and eye
Covered face with ash
And pretend that I am fine

Life is short, live fast
Go ahead and ask
Can I ride your coat tail?
Can I use your name?
Life is short, live fast
Go ahead and ask
Can I ride your coat tail?
Can I use your name?

Straight from the pit of hell
Cometh vengeance and retribution
Bring me forth a fallen man
I will cleanse my shame with spirit

Capillarian slaved by daily storm
Soil of earth and daily drought
Crystalline beauty shines bright and low
Ocean of life surrounds


We come together as one in spirit
United, broken spirits
Trapped inside a void of nothingness
Binding spirits, shattered crown


Floating weightless space between
Circle created with intention
Awaiting the dawn to shine through the clouds
Reveal the face of the godhead


Carve your teeth from ivory
Cut tongue of all beings
Enter this crystal cave
Journey through darkness
Dispelling illusion

Reflect on brilliant beauty
Given forth by gods
Dispelling illusion
Reflecting brilliance


Siren calls our name

Shades of brilliant light
Reflections fade away
Boiling hell freezes
Crashing waves collide

Fire bird flies above
Burning glass earth's core
Boiling hell freezes
Crashing waves collide

Eyes alive and burning
Burning for answer
Change of seasons coming
Winter always lasts forever
All circles created with intention

Straight six-shooter
How many rounds you got?
You better not mess with it
You ain't getting what you got


It makes me wonder why
I keep falling down
Or if I stay around
Then how low will I come down?

And then the fightin' breaks out
Death and danger all around
Fire in my head is dancing
Burn my skin, burn my soul


Taking on another man
Is that wise or unwise?
Chew tobacco and spit the rest
To hell with them all, we didn't drink for this


Oh yeah! Oh yeah!

Taking on another man
Is that wise or unwise?
Chew tobacco and spit the rest
To hell with them all, we didn't drink for this

Oh yeah! Oh yeah!

Straight six-shooter
How many rounds you got?
You better not mess with it
You ain't getting what you got

Oh yeah! Oh yeah!

It's hard to tell where we came from
Life is good, I wonder what tomorrow brings
Our hearts bleed for the broken road ahead
Knowing that this will lead us into overdrive


Lay me down, stand alone
Stand my ground and fight
Pushing through all your doubt
You can do it all in time


Falling asleep in the back of a station wagon
Gone away on some adventure new and strange
Letting loose our minds and letting go our hearts
Knowing there'll be no end when they put us underground


Lay me down, stand alone
Stand my ground and fight
Pushing through all your doubt
You can do it all in time

Taking the diamond out of the goat's nose
Throwing him down so he knows his place
Taking the seed out of the snake's head
Chew it up, spit it out before you swallow


Lay me down, stand alone
Stand my ground and fight
Pushing through all your doubt
You can do it all in time

Elephant spirits
Tower stories
Fire beings
Earth's body


Plant the seed
Worship deity
Guard against
The danger of us


Mountain spirits
Snake spirits
Go away, we're scared


Fly through forest shadows
Run with animal minds
Leave our skin and souls behind
Ride on tides


Shame on you, father time
Taking all from this loving rhyme
Guide my spirit
Save me from evil


Moon shines down on me
I wonder if you see my face
Center of the storm is where I lay
And that makes it hard to escape
Always near, always there
Take me now and never share
Guide my spirit
Save me from evil


Within these walls
I hear you knockin
Digging holes
I listen for rain

Pushing towards mountain tops
Our hearts are bleeding drought
Taking wise men as our guide
To show us how to get out


Within these walls
I hear you knockin'
Digging holes
I listen for rain

Pushing towards mountain tops
Our hearts are bleeding drought
Taking wise men as our guide
To show us how to get out

Straight from the pit of hell
Throw your middle finger up
Show you're better than they are
Not afraid to be myself
I laugh in the face of danger
No escape I dug this hole


Run away, run for your life
Run to the forest and escape
Leave your skin inside the fire
Burn it all down to ash and dirt
Burning hell below our feet
Shake the hand of lightning


The battle is not yet won
We will fight until the end
Death, disease and famine
Lay waste to all we've seen
Running faster than lightning
Our hearts remain in ash and earth
Run away, run for your life
Run to the forest and escape
Leave your skin inside the fire
Burn it all down to ash and dirt


Rising tides
Taking all that I own
Rising tides
Taking all that I've known


Gone, gone, gone
Lost my love
Gone, gone, gone
Take my hand
Gone, gone, gone
Never ending story
Gone, gone, gone
Hold me tight

Straighten the crown
Or burst the crown


Wage war with my hands
Wage war for your life
And when you're dead and buried underground
There will be no teeth to bite your tongue

Death comes creeping through the shadows
Death of the fallen flies
Death of the godhead
Realm of mystic majesty, majesty


Center down the line
Center of attraction

Taking it back from these pigs
Dig them out from their graves
Their heads should burn in fire
Taking them all away
Leaving none behind

Taking them all away
Leaving none behind
